obligations: Right to operate a single Branded Hotel using Licensed Brand and Licensed System
5-year initial term from Effective Date
Auto-renewal for one additional 5-year term unless franchisee gives 90-180 days' notice or franchisor elects not to renew
Single location only — the Premises specified on cover page
No relocation permitted
No additional business at Premises without prior written approval
ABSOLUTELY NO TERRITORIAL RIGHTS — expressly acknowledged
Must convert Incumbent Hotel by cover page deadline or 90 days from Effective Date
Franchisee represents: lawful right to occupy for full Term, hotel in good working condition, no legal violations, conversion won't violate any obligations
Must deliver dimensions/photos of all signage before installation; franchisor must approve all Licensed Brand signage
Must deliver professional-quality photos of rebranded hotel before Launch Date at franchisee cost
Franchisee responsible for lease compliance including signage rights and de-identification obligations
Must comply with all Brand Standards as modified periodically by franchisor in sole discretion
Brand Standards cover: trademarks, minimum customer rating, gift cards/loyalty, customer service, product development, payment systems, pricing, online presences, technology
Minimum Customer Rating: 3.4/5 (Magnuson Hotels), 3.6/5 (Magnuson Grand) — franchisee breach if below
Franchisor may impose minimum or maximum prices if permitted by law
Franchisee solely responsible for implementation at own cost
Franchisor may vary Brand Standards for different hotels without extending same variation to franchisee
Brand Standards Manual provided during Term; may be online
May not copy, duplicate, or record any part without approval
Must monitor Online Presence for updates
Regularly clean, repaint, repair interior and exterior
Repair or replace worn/obsolete fixtures and equipment
Maintain to industry standards of professionalism, cleanliness, sanitation, efficiency, pleasant ambiance
Secure and maintain all required licenses, permits, certificates
Comply with website privacy policy as amended
Comply with data deletion requests
Highest standards of honesty, integrity, fair dealing, ethical conduct
Promptly provide copies of any violation notices to franchisor
Franchisee solely responsible for all management
May not delegate or enter into management company arrangements without prior written consent
Must timely pay all third-party suppliers, lenders, landlords
Must identify Managing Owner (natural person, full-time)
Managing Owner decisions are final and binding on franchisee
All employees/contractors are franchisee's — not franchisor's
Exclusively responsible for all employment costs
Franchisor may require NDAs for personnel with access to Confidential Information
Franchisor may contact any hotel guest at any time for any purpose
Franchisor may address guest complaints including refunds at franchisee's cost
Must participate in designated loyalty/satisfaction programs
Guest Information (other than Restricted Data) is franchisor's Confidential Information
Must process guest data per all applicable laws and franchisor's privacy policies
Must assist franchisor with compliance obligations
Must notify franchisor immediately of any data breach and follow franchisor instructions
Franchisor may conduct data security/privacy audit at any time
Restricted Data (employee PII, designated items) remains franchisee's responsibility
Must maintain coverage per Brand Standards at own expense
Franchisor and affiliates as additional named insureds
Primary and non-contributory policies
Initial certificates before Launch Date; annual renewals
30 days' notice of modification/cancellation
Waiver of subrogation rights against franchisor
If franchisee fails to procure: must pay franchisor's costs to obtain coverage + $250/month fee
100% of Guest Rooms available for sale at all times via Approved PMS or Magnuson Cloud PMS
If Approved PMS: reimburse franchisor for all integration/connectivity costs
Franchisor has unrestricted independent access to PMS data at all times
May not remove room from inventory >14 days without approval — else Extended Closure Fee
Franchisor has sole exclusive right to all Third-Party Distribution Channel listings
Must transfer existing OTA accounts to franchisor
Must honor all confirmed reservations; rebooking obligation + 200% fee for failures
Changes may take 72 hours — no refunds for delays
Magnuson Cloud PMS — NO WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND; franchisor disclaims all liability for PMS errors, downtime, cyber incidents
Must comply with all PMS terms/conditions as modified
Franchisor owns all Online Presences (websites, social media, etc.)
Must transfer existing Incumbent Hotel online presences to franchisor
May not create any online presence mentioning hotel without approval
If approved, must follow guidelines and grant franchisor access at own cost
Initial franchise fee: $10,000, non-refundable
Continuing fee: 8% of Gross Room Revenue, monthly
GDS booking fees: $11.50/booking
Distribution channel fees: all fees/commissions for Third-Party Distribution Channels
Minimum invoiced revenue: $250/month (10%/year increase cap)
Payment via ACH or credit card; franchisor controls method
Late payment: 5% + 1.5%/month (18% annual)
Franchisor may set off amounts owed
Franchisee may not withhold payment for any reason including alleged non-performance
Tax withholding: must reimburse franchisor for any gross receipts/sales/use tax on payments
Franchisor may enter Premises at all times, with or without notice, to inspect
May take video, photos, samples, speak with guests/personnel, access computers, review books
May use mystery shoppers and quality assurance inspections
Failed inspection fee: $2,500 + follow-up costs
Conversion violation: $1,000/month until compliant
Standards violation: $2,000/month until compliant
Suspension of services (PMS, OTA listings) if franchisee in default — re-activation fee $750 + $25/day
Quarterly and annual financial reporting required (BS, P&L, CF)
Financial audits at any time without prior notice
GRR understatement: immediate payment of applicable fees + late fees; if >=3% then audit costs too
Confidential Information broadly defined: Brand Standards, agreements, PMS software/data, operating results, guest information
Owned by franchisor; franchisee has no interest except right to use during Term
Must process/retain/use/collect/disclose only as necessary for hotel operation
Must adopt administrative/physical/technical safeguards
Must return/destroy on request
All ideas/concepts/materials created by franchisee become franchisor property (work-for-hire); assignment of non-qualifying items
Unauthorized use = irreparable harm, entitles injunctive relief
During and after Term: may not disparage franchisor, affiliates, Licensed Brand, Licensed System, or any Branded Hotel
Extends to spouses, family members, shareholders, officers, directors, agents, partners, employees, representatives, attorneys, affiliates, successors, assigns
May not take action that would subject foregoing to ridicule, scandal, reproach, scorn, indignity or constitute moral turpitude
During and after Term: may not solicit, interfere, or attempt to interfere with franchisor's relationships with customers, franchisees, lenders, vendors, consultants
Same broad scope as non-disparagement
Franchisee solely responsible for all Claims relating to business, Franchise, Premises, hotel operation, breach of agreement — even if brought after transfer/termination/expiration
Must indemnify, defend, hold harmless franchisor and all affiliates/owners/directors/officers/employees/agents/successors/assigns
Claims include: all damages (actual, consequential), accountants'/attorneys'/expert fees, investigation costs, court costs, travel, settlement costs
Indemnified parties may defend at franchisee expense, choose own counsel
Franchisee may not settle without indemnified party consent
No duty to mitigate
Each Owner and their spouse must execute guaranty
Personal and unconditional guaranty of ALL obligations (monetary and non-monetary)
Joint and several liability
Waiver of: acceptance notice, demand notice, protest notice, requirement to proceed against franchisee first, statute of limitations defense
Franchisor may proceed against any guarantor without first proceeding against franchisee
No diminishment by extensions, credits, or indulgences
Continuing and irrevocable during Term
Guarantors bound by restrictive covenants, confidentiality, indemnification, and dispute resolution provisions
Entity guarantors: no distributions while delinquent on guaranteed obligations
Spousal consent binds marital estate assets
clauses.scope: unlimited — all obligations under the agreement

obligations: Franchisor: fully transferable without franchisee consent or notice
Franchisee: no transfer without prior written approval

Transfer broadly defined: voluntary/involuntary, direct/indirect, assignment/sale/gift/disposition, encumbrance/mortgage/pledge, merger/consolidation/securities issuance, death/disability/divorce/insolvency/foreclosure/loss of control
Conditions: written application, general release, full compliance, transferee signs current-form agreement (may differ materially), evidence of proper transfer
Franchisor may review all information given to transferee and supplement/correct
Consent is not representation of fairness or success
Death/disability: 6 months to sell to approved person; hotel must remain compliant; manager may need to be appointed
Either party: 30-day cure for breach

Franchisor immediate termination: 12 non-curable grounds (misrepresentation, abandonment, unauthorized transfer, felony, loss of premises, confidentiality violation, health/safety, GRR understatement, insolvency, repeated violations, below minimum customer rating)
Termination Damages: NPV of continuing fees from termination to earlier of 12 months or term expiration, calculated on trailing 12-month average
Inconvenience fee: $2,000 (up to $5,000) for <90 days' notice
De-identification processing fee: $9,995 if not completed within 30 days
Post-termination: immediate closure, de-identification, return confidential info, transfer online presences, cease all brand use
Franchisor may enter premises to remove brand materials without liability for trespass
Franchisee appoints franchisor as attorney-in-fact for de-identification purposes
Binding arbitration: AAA, one arbitrator, within 50 miles of Casper, WY
Federal Arbitration Act governs
Arbitrator may award money damages, interest, costs, attorneys' fees, specific performance, injunctive relief — but NOT punitive/exemplary damages and may NOT invalidate trademarks
Individual basis only — no class arbitration, no consolidation, no class action
Limited discovery: reasonable document requests only, no interrogatories
Venue for court actions: state/federal court closest to Casper, WY
Governing law: Wyoming (except Federal Arbitration Act)
Prevailing party: costs and attorneys' fees
WAIVER: punitive damages, jury trial
LIMITATIONS: 1 year from date of knowledge (except non-payment)
CLASS ACTION BAR
Injunctive relief available without bond
Section survives termination
Ongoing representation: no sanctions, export controls, anti-terrorism, anti-money laundering restrictions
No funds from proscribed activities
Must notify franchisor immediately if representations become untrue
No force majeure clause found in the Franchise Agreement

items: NO exclusive territory (emphatically stated as Section 5: 'No Territory')
NO non-competition covenant (unusual for hotel franchises)
100% room availability requirement at all times
Minimum Customer Rating as termination trigger (3.4 or 3.6 stars)
Franchisor's sole control of ALL distribution channels — franchisee cannot self-list on any OTA
Must transfer existing online presences and OTA accounts to franchisor
Magnuson Cloud PMS liability fully disclaimed — no warranties, no liability for downtime/errors/cyber incidents
Franchisor may designate minimum/maximum room prices if law permits
GRR misreporting: 110% penalty calculation with no reimbursement obligation
No advertising fund or cooperative of any kind
Non-disparagement survives termination and extends to family members
